name: Sour Cream Rhubarb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Arrange rhubarb in an unbaked pie shell.
3. Mix sugar and flour; blend in sour cream and pour over the rhubarb evenly.
4. Blend topping ingredients until crumbly.
5. Sprinkle crumbs over the rhubarb.
6. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes, then reduce temperature to 350°F and bake an additional 30 minutes until fruit is tender, filling set, and crumb topping golden.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
